name: frustrated-question-still-answered
description: User is annoyed and wraps a question in frustration: 'I said what services do you provide, are you dumb?'. Bot must still recognize this as a QUESTION (so it answers + re-asks current step) — NOT as an objection or as the answer to the current question. Earlier the bot just kept re-asking 'what's your business name?' and ignored the user's frustration entirely.

turns.user: I said what services do you provide, are you dumb?
